## reference · component documentation anatomy

* The GOV.UK Design System provides guidance on component usage, including the button component.
* Component documentation includes information on when to use a component, its variants, and states.

* For the button component:
  * Use for calls to action, such as submitting a form or navigating to a new page.
  * Variants include:
    + Default (or "primary")
    + Secondary
    + Success
    + Warning
    + Danger
  * States include:
    + Hover
    + Focus
    + Active
    + Disabled

Sources: https://design-system.service.gov.uk/components/button/
